hooks.command: python -c "import os,pathlib,runpy,sys; root=pathlib.Path(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT') or os.getcwd()).resolve(); runner=next((p/'hooks'/'run.py' for p in (root,*root.parents) if (p/'hooks'/'run.py').is_file()), None); sys.exit('dream-studio hook root not found') if runner is None else None; sys.argv=[str(runner),*sys.argv[1:]]; runpy.run_path(str(runner),run_name='__main__')" on-prompt-dispatch
